meta.description: Centralized jq query patterns for knowledge graph operations
meta.usage: Reference patterns for consistent jq operations across all scripts

graph.get_dependency_counts: .graph | to_entries | map({entity: .key, dep_count: (.value.depends_on | length)}) | sort_by(.dep_count) | reverse
graph.find_orphaned_entities: (.graph | [.[] | .depends_on[]?]) as $referenced | .graph | keys[] | select(. as $entity | $referenced | index($entity) | not)
graph.find_missing_references: (.graph | keys) as $valid_entities | .graph | to_entries[] | .value.depends_on[]? | select(. as $ref | $valid_entities | index($ref) | not)

analysis.dependency_chains: def find_deps($entity): (.graph[$entity].depends_on[]? // empty) as $dep | $dep, find_deps($dep); find_deps($entity)
analysis.circular_dependencies: def has_cycle($start; $current; $visited): if ($visited | has($current)) then if $current == $start then true else false end else (.graph[$current].depends_on[]? // empty) as $next | has_cycle($start; $next; $visited + {($current): true}) end; .graph | keys[] as $entity | select(has_cycle($entity; $entity; {})) | $entity
analysis.dependency_depth: def depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | has($entity)) then 0 else [(.graph[$entity].depends_on[]? // empty) | depth(.; $visited + {($entity): true})] | if length == 0 then 0 else (max + 1) end end; .graph | to_entries | map({entity: .key, depth: depth(.key; {})}) | group_by(.depth) | map({layer: .[0].depth, entities: [.[].entity]})
analysis.critical_dependencies: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] | group_by(.) | map({entity: .[0], dependent_count: length}) | sort_by(.dependent_count) | reverse | .[0:10]
analysis.complexity_analysis: .graph | to_entries | map({entity: .key, complexity: (.value.depends_on | length), dependencies: .value.depends_on}) | sort_by(.complexity) | reverse | .[0:10]

validation.entity_completeness: .entities[$type][$id] | {name: (.name != null), description: (.description_ref != null), requirements: (.requirements | length > 0), acceptance_criteria: (.acceptance_criteria | length > 0)}
validation.reference_integrity: (.references.descriptions | keys) as $valid_refs | .entities | to_entries[] | .value | to_entries[] | select(.value.description_ref?) | .value.description_ref | select(. as $ref | $valid_refs | index($ref) | not)
validation.graph_integrity: (.entities | to_entries | map("\(.key):\(.value | keys[])")) as $valid_entities | .graph | to_entries[] | .value.depends_on[]? | select(. as $ref | $valid_entities | index($ref) | not)

components.get_component_models: .graph | to_entries[] | select(.key | startswith("component:")) | {component: .key, models: [.value.depends_on[] | select(startswith("schema:") or startswith("model:"))]}

reporting.system_summary: {total_entities: (.graph | keys | length), total_dependencies: (.graph | [.[] | .depends_on[]?] | length), entities_by_type: (.entities | to_entries | map({type: .key, count: (.value | length)})), dependency_distribution: (.graph | to_entries | map({entity: .key, dep_count: (.value.depends_on | length)}) | group_by(.dep_count) | map({dependency_count: .[0].dep_count, entity_count: length}))}
reporting.bottleneck_analysis: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] | group_by(.) | map({dependency: .[0], usage_count: length}) | sort_by(.usage_count) | reverse | .[0:10]
reporting.layer_analysis: (.graph | [.[] | .depends_on[]?] | unique) as $deps | .graph | keys | map(select(. as $entity | $deps | index($entity) | not)) as $roots | {root_entities: $roots, total_layers: ($deps | length)}

graph_visualization.mermaid_nodes: [.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null) | .key as $entity | .value as $data | (($data.depends_on // []) | length) as $out_degree | ([.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null and (.value.depends_on != null)) | .value.depends_on[] | select(. == $entity)] | length) as $in_degree | "  " + ($entity | gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]"; "_")) + "[\"" + $entity + "\"]" + (if $in_degree == 0 then ":::root" elif $out_degree == 0 then ":::leaf" elif $in_degree >= 3 then ":::critical" elif $out_degree >= 5 then ":::complex" else "" end)] | join("\n")
graph_visualization.mermaid_edges: [.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null and .value.depends_on != null and (.value.depends_on | length) > 0) | .key as $from | .value.depends_on[] as $to | "  " + ($from | gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]"; "_")) + " --> " + ($to | gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]"; "_"))] | join("\n")
graph_visualization.dot_nodes: [.graph | keys[] as $entity | (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) as $out_degree | ([.graph | .[] | select(.depends_on != null) | .depends_on[]] | map(select(. == $entity)) | length) as $in_degree | "  \"" + $entity + "\" [" + (if $in_degree == 0 then "fillcolor=lightgreen" elif $out_degree == 0 then "fillcolor=lightcoral" elif $in_degree >= 3 then "fillcolor=orange" elif $out_degree >= 5 then "fillcolor=yellow" else "fillcolor=lightblue" end) + ", tooltip=\"In:" + ($in_degree|tostring) + " Out:" + ($out_degree|tostring) + "\"];"]) | join("\n")
graph_visualization.dot_nodes_enhanced: [.graph | keys[] as $entity | (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) as $out_degree | ([.graph | .[] | select(.depends_on != null) | .depends_on[]] | map(select(. == $entity)) | length) as $in_degree | "  \"" + $entity + "\" [" + (if $in_degree == 0 then "fillcolor=\"#90EE90\", color=\"#2e7d32\"" elif $out_degree == 0 then "fillcolor=\"#FFB6C1\", color=\"#c62828\"" elif $in_degree >= 3 then "fillcolor=\"#FFA500\", color=\"#ef6c00\"" elif $out_degree >= 5 then "fillcolor=\"#FFFF99\", color=\"#f57f17\"" else "fillcolor=\"#E3F2FD\", color=\"#1976d2\"" end) + ", tooltip=\"" + $entity + "\\nDependents: " + ($in_degree|tostring) + "\\nDependencies: " + ($out_degree|tostring) + "\"];"]) | join("\n")
graph_visualization.dot_edges: [.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null and .value.depends_on != null and (.value.depends_on | length) > 0) | .key as $from | .value.depends_on[] as $to | "  \"" + $from + "\" -> \"" + $to + "\";"] | join("\n")
graph_visualization.visualization_stats: (.graph | keys | length) as $total_entities | [.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null and .value.depends_on != null) | .value.depends_on[]] as $all_deps | {total_entities: $total_entities, total_edges: ($all_deps | length), root_nodes: ((.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | select($all_deps | index($entity) | not)] | length), leaf_nodes: ([.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null) | select((.value.depends_on // []) | length == 0)] | length), max_fan_out: ([.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null) | (.value.depends_on // [] | length)] | max // 0), max_fan_in: ([.graph | keys[] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length)] | max // 0), avg_fan_out: ([.graph | to_entries[] | select(.value != null) | (.value.depends_on // [] | length)] | add / length), density: (if $total_entities > 1 then ($all_deps | length) / ($total_entities * ($total_entities - 1)) else 0 end)}

coupling_analysis.bidirectional_deps: .graph as $g | [$g | to_entries[] | .key as $a | (.value.depends_on // [])[] as $b | select($g[$b].depends_on // [] | index($a)) | if $a < $b then [$a, $b] else [$b, $a] end] | unique[] | join(" <-> ")
coupling_analysis.high_fan_in: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, fan_in: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length)}] | sort_by(-.fan_in) | .[] | select(.fan_in >= 3) | "\(.fan_in)\t\(.entity)"
coupling_analysis.simple_cycles: def find_cycles: .graph as $g | [$g | keys[] as $start | paths_from($start; []; $g) | select(length > 2 and .[0] == .[-1]) | .[:-1] | sort] | unique[] | join(" -> "); def paths_from($node; $path; $graph): if ($path | index($node)) then $path + [$node] else ($graph[$node].depends_on // [])[] as $next | paths_from($next; $path + [$node]; $graph) end; [find_cycles] | if length > 0 then .[] else empty end
coupling_analysis.afferent_coupling: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length)] | if length > 0 then (add / length) else 0 end
coupling_analysis.efferent_coupling: [.graph | .[] | (.depends_on // [] | length)] | if length > 0 then (add / length) else 0 end

dead_code_analysis.orphaned_entities: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $all_entities | [$all_entities[] as $entity | select($all_deps | index($entity) | not) | if (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) > 0 then {entity: $entity, dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length), type: "orphaned"} else {entity: $entity, dependencies: 0, type: "root"} end] | map(select(.type == "orphaned")) | if length > 0 then .[] | "\(.entity) (depends on \(.dependencies) entities)" else empty end
dead_code_analysis.low_utilization: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $all_entities | [$all_entities[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, dependents: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length), dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length)}] | map(select(.dependents == 1)) | if length > 0 then .[] | "\(.entity) (1 dependent, \(.dependencies) dependencies)" else empty end

graph_health.hanging_references: ([.entities | .. | objects | select(has("id")) | .id] + [.graph | keys[]]) as $all_entities | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] | unique[] | select(startswith("external:") | not) | select(. as $ref | $all_entities | index($ref) | not)
graph_health.orphaned_entities: (.graph | keys) as $graph_entities | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $referenced | $graph_entities[] | select(. as $entity | ($referenced | index($entity) | not))
graph_health.missing_graph_entries: [.entities | .. | objects | select(has("id")) | .id] as $entity_ids | (.graph | keys) as $graph_entities | $entity_ids[] | select(. as $entity | $graph_entities | index($entity) | not)
graph_health.circular_dependencies_2hop: .graph as $g | $g | to_entries[] | .key as $entity | .value.depends_on[]? as $dep | select($g[$dep].depends_on[]? == $entity) | [$entity, $dep] | sort | join(" <-> ")

critical_path_analysis.max_dependency_depth: def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, depth: max_depth($entity; [])}] | sort_by(-.depth) | .[:10][] | "\(.depth)\t\(.entity)"
critical_path_analysis.critical_bottlenecks: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, dependents: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length)}] | sort_by(-.dependents) | .[:10][] | select(.dependents > 0) | "\(.dependents)\t\(.entity)"
critical_path_analysis.critical_path_entities: def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, depth: max_depth($entity; [])}] | (map(.depth) | max) as $max_depth | [.[] | select(.depth == $max_depth) | .entity] | sort[]
critical_path_analysis.summary_stats: {total_entities: (.graph | keys | length), entities_with_deps: (.graph | [.[] | select(.depends_on and (.depends_on | length) > 0)] | length), avg_dependencies: ([.graph | .[] | .depends_on // [] | length] | add / length)}

dependency_metrics.basic_statistics: {total_entities: (.graph | keys | length), total_dependencies: ([.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] | length), entities_with_deps: ([.graph | .[] | select(.depends_on and (.depends_on | length) > 0)] | length), unique_dependencies: ([.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] | unique | length), max_fan_out: ([.graph | .[] | (.depends_on // [] | length)] | max // 0), max_fan_in: ([.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length)] | max // 0)} | to_entries[] | "\(.key): \(.value)"
dependency_metrics.fan_out_distribution: [.graph | .[] | (.depends_on // [] | length)] | group_by(.) | map({dependencies: .[0], count: length}) | sort_by(.dependencies) | .[] | "\(.dependencies)\t\(.count)"
dependency_metrics.fan_in_distribution: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length)] | group_by(.) | map({dependents: .[0], count: length}) | sort_by(.dependents) | .[] | "\(.dependents)\t\(.count)"
dependency_metrics.depth_analysis:
def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, depth: max_depth($entity; [])}] | {max_depth: (map(.depth) | max // 0), avg_depth: (map(.depth) | add / length), entities_by_depth: (group_by(.depth) | map({depth: .[0].depth, count: length}))} | "Max dependency depth: \(.max_depth)" + "
" + "Average dependency depth: \(.avg_depth | . * 100 | round / 100)" + "
" + "Depth distribution:" + "
" + (.entities_by_depth[] | "  \(.depth) levels: \(.count) entities")
dependency_metrics.degree_centrality: (.graph | keys | length - 1) as $n | if $n > 0 then [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, out_degree: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length), in_degree: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length), total_degree: ((.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) + ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length))}] | map(. + {centrality: (.total_degree / $n)}) | sort_by(-.centrality) | .[0:5][] | "\(.entity): \(.centrality * 100 | . * 100 | round / 100)% (in:\(.in_degree), out:\(.out_degree))" else "Not enough entities for centrality calculation" end
dependency_metrics.clustering_coefficient: (.graph | keys | length) as $n | if $n > 2 then [.graph | to_entries[] | .key as $node | (.value.depends_on // []) as $neighbors | if ($neighbors | length) < 2 then 0 else [range(0; $neighbors | length) as $i | range($i+1; $neighbors | length) as $j | if (.graph[$neighbors[$i]].depends_on // [] | index($neighbors[$j])) or (.graph[$neighbors[$j]].depends_on // [] | index($neighbors[$i])) then 1 else 0 end] | (add // 0) as $connections | ($neighbors | length) as $k | if $k > 1 then (2 * $connections) / ($k * ($k - 1)) else 0 end end] | {avg_clustering: (add / length), entities_with_clustering: (map(select(. > 0)) | length), max_clustering: (max // 0)} | "Average clustering coefficient: \(.avg_clustering * 100 | round / 100)" + "\n" + "Entities with clustering: \(.entities_with_clustering)" + "\n" + "Maximum clustering coefficient: \(.max_clustering * 100 | round / 100)" else "Not enough entities for clustering calculation" end
dependency_metrics.stability_metrics:
(.graph | keys | length) as $total_entities | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | {entities: [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, ca: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length), ce: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length)} | . + {instability: (if (.ca + .ce) > 0 then .ce / (.ca + .ce) else 0 end)}]} | {avg_instability: (.entities | map(.instability) | add / length), stable_entities: (.entities | map(select(.instability < 0.3)) | length), unstable_entities: (.entities | map(select(.instability > 0.7)) | length), most_stable: (.entities | sort_by(.instability) | .[0].entity), most_unstable: (.entities | sort_by(-.instability) | .[0].entity)} | "Average instability: \(.avg_instability * 100 | round / 100)%" + "
" + "Stable entities (I < 0.3): \(.stable_entities)" + "
" + "Unstable entities (I > 0.7): \(.unstable_entities)" + "
" + "Most stable: \(.most_stable)" + "
" + "Most unstable: \(.most_unstable)"
dependency_metrics.complexity_indicators:
(.graph | keys | length) as $n | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | {edges: ($all_deps | length), nodes: $n, cyclomatic: (($all_deps | length) - $n + 2), density: (if $n > 1 then ($all_deps | length) / ($n * ($n - 1)) else 0 end), leaves: ([.graph | .[] | select((.depends_on // []) | length == 0)] | length), leaf_ratio: (([.graph | .[] | select((.depends_on // []) | length == 0)] | length) / $n)} | "Cyclomatic complexity: \(.cyclomatic)" + "
" + "Graph density: \(.density * 100 | . * 100 | round / 100)%" + "
" + "Leaf entities: \(.leaves) (\(.leaf_ratio * 100 | round / 100)%)" + "
" + "Edges/Nodes ratio: \(.edges / (.nodes | if . > 0 then . else 1 end) | . * 100 | round / 100)"
dependency_metrics.quality_assessment:
(.graph | keys | length) as $n | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | {density: (if $n > 1 then ($all_deps | length) / ($n * ($n - 1)) else 0 end), avg_fan_out: ([.graph | .[] | (.depends_on // [] | length)] | add / length), max_depth: (def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | keys[] as $entity | max_depth($entity; [])] | max // 0)} | {density_score: (if .density < 0.1 then 5 elif .density < 0.2 then 3 else 1 end), fan_out_score: (if .avg_fan_out < 3 then 5 elif .avg_fan_out < 5 then 3 else 1 end), depth_score: (if .max_depth < 4 then 5 elif .max_depth < 7 then 3 else 1 end), total_score: ((if .density < 0.1 then 5 elif .density < 0.2 then 3 else 1 end) + (if .avg_fan_out < 3 then 5 elif .avg_fan_out < 5 then 3 else 1 end) + (if .max_depth < 4 then 5 elif .max_depth < 7 then 3 else 1 end))} | "Density quality: \(.density_score)/5" + "
" + "Fan-out quality: \(.fan_out_score)/5" + "
" + "Depth quality: \(.depth_score)/5" + "
" + "Overall quality: \(.total_score)/15" + "
" + (if .total_score >= 13 then "Rating: 🟢 EXCELLENT" elif .total_score >= 10 then "Rating: 🟡 GOOD" elif .total_score >= 7 then "Rating: 🟠 FAIR" else "Rating: 🔴 NEEDS IMPROVEMENT" end)

architecture_validation.layered_architecture_violations: def get_layer($entity): if ($entity | test("^(ui|UI|view|View|component|Component)")) then "ui" elif ($entity | test("^(service|Service|api|API|controller|Controller)")) then "service" elif ($entity | test("^(domain|Domain|model|Model|business|Business)")) then "domain" elif ($entity | test("^(data|Data|repository|Repository|dao|DAO|database|Database)")) then "data" else "unknown" end; def layers: ["data", "domain", "service", "ui"]; def violates_layers($from_layer; $to_layer): (layers | index($from_layer)) as $from_idx | (layers | index($to_layer)) as $to_idx | if ($from_idx != null and $to_idx != null) then $from_idx > $to_idx else false end; [.graph | to_entries[] | .key as $entity | get_layer($entity) as $from_layer | (.value.depends_on // [])[] as $dep | get_layer($dep) as $to_layer | select(violates_layers($from_layer; $to_layer)) | {from: $entity, to: $dep, from_layer: $from_layer, to_layer: $to_layer}] | if length > 0 then .[] | "\(.from) (\(.from_layer)) -> \(.to) (\(.to_layer))" else empty end
architecture_validation.dependency_limit_violations: [.graph | to_entries[] | select((.value.depends_on // [] | length) > $limit) | "\(.key): \(.value.depends_on | length) dependencies"] | if length > 0 then .[] else empty end
architecture_validation.dependent_limit_violations: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length) as $dependents | select($dependents > $limit) | "\($entity): \($dependents) dependents"] | if length > 0 then .[] else empty end
architecture_validation.depth_limit_violations: def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, depth: max_depth($entity; [])} | select(.depth > $limit) | "\(.entity): depth \(.depth)"] | if length > 0 then .[] else empty end
architecture_validation.circular_dependency_violations: def has_cycle($start; $current; $path; $visited): if ($visited | has($current)) then if $current == $start then [$path + [$current]] else [] end else (.graph[$current].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then [] else [$deps[] | has_cycle($start; .; $path + [$current]; $visited + {($current): true})] | flatten end end; [.graph | keys[] as $entity | has_cycle($entity; $entity; []; {})] | flatten | unique | if length > 0 then .[] | join(" -> ") else empty end

dead_code_analysis.orphaned_entities: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $all_entities | [$all_entities[] as $entity | select($all_deps | index($entity) | not) | $entity] as $no_dependents | [$no_dependents[] as $entity | if (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) > 0 then {entity: $entity, dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length), type: "orphaned"} else {entity: $entity, dependencies: 0, type: "root"} end] | map(select(.type == "orphaned")) | if length > 0 then .[] | "\(.entity) (depends on \(.dependencies) entities)" else empty end
dead_code_analysis.root_entities: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $all_entities | [$all_entities[] as $entity | select($all_deps | index($entity) | not) | {entity: $entity, dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length), type: (if (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) > 0 then "orphaned" else "root" end)}] | map(select(.type == "root")) | if length > 0 then .[] | "\(.entity) (\(.dependencies) dependencies)" else empty end
dead_code_analysis.low_utilization_entities: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $all_entities | [$all_entities[] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length) as $dependents | select($dependents == 1) | {entity: $entity, dependents: $dependents, dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length)}] | sort_by(-.dependencies) | if length > 0 then .[] | "\(.entity) (\(.dependents) dependent, \(.dependencies) dependencies)" else empty end
dead_code_analysis.utility_entities: [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $all_entities | [$all_entities[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, dependents: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length), dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length)} | select(.dependencies >= 3 and .dependents <= 2 and .dependents > 0)] | sort_by(.dependencies - .dependents) | reverse | if length > 0 then .[] | "\(.entity) (\(.dependencies) deps → \(.dependents) dependents)" else empty end
dead_code_analysis.duplicate_patterns: [.graph | to_entries[] | {entity: .key, deps: (.value.depends_on // [] | sort)} | select(.deps | length > 0)] | group_by(.deps) | map(select(length > 1)) | if length > 0 then .[] | "Pattern [" + (.[0].deps | join(", ")) + "] → " + ([.[].entity] | join(", ")) else empty end
dead_code_analysis.dead_code_statistics:
[.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | (.graph | keys) as $all_entities | ($all_entities | length) as $total | [$all_entities[] as $entity | select($all_deps | index($entity) | not) | $entity] as $no_dependents | ($no_dependents | length) as $roots | ([$no_dependents[] as $entity | select((.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) > 0)] | length) as $orphaned | [$all_entities[] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length) as $dependents | select($dependents == 1)] as $low_util | ($low_util | length) as $low_util_count | "Total entities: \($total)
Root entities (no dependents): \($roots) (\(($roots * 100 / $total) | round)%)
Orphaned entities: \($orphaned) (\(($orphaned * 100 / $total) | round)%)
Low utilization entities: \($low_util_count) (\(($low_util_count * 100 / $total) | round)%)
Potential dead code: \($orphaned + $low_util_count) entities (\((($orphaned + $low_util_count) * 100 / $total) | round)%)"

complexity_analysis.entity_complexity_scores: def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length), dependents: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length), depth: max_depth($entity; []), transitive_deps: (def count_transitive($node; $visited): if ($visited | index($node)) then [] else (.graph[$node].depends_on // []) as $direct | $direct + ([$direct[] | count_transitive(.; $visited + [$node])] | flatten) end; [count_transitive($entity; [])] | flatten | unique | length)}] | map(. + {complexity_score: ((.dependencies * 2) + (.dependents * 1.5) + (.depth * 3) + (.transitive_deps * 0.5))}) | sort_by(-.complexity_score) | .[:15][] | "\(.complexity_score | . * 10 | round / 10)\t\(.entity)\t(deps:\(.dependencies) dependents:\(.dependents) depth:\(.depth) trans:\(.transitive_deps))"
complexity_analysis.complexity_categories: def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, dependencies: (.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length), dependents: ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length), depth: max_depth($entity; []), transitive_deps: (def count_transitive($node; $visited): if ($visited | index($node)) then [] else (.graph[$node].depends_on // []) as $direct | $direct + ([$direct[] | count_transitive(.; $visited + [$node])] | flatten) end; [count_transitive($entity; [])] | flatten | unique | length)}] | map(. + {complexity_score: ((.dependencies * 2) + (.dependents * 1.5) + (.depth * 3) + (.transitive_deps * 0.5)), category: ((.dependencies * 2) + (.dependents * 1.5) + (.depth * 3) + (.transitive_deps * 0.5) | if . <= 5 then "🟢 Simple" elif . <= 15 then "🟡 Moderate" elif . <= 30 then "🟠 Complex" else "🔴 Critical" end)}) | group_by(.category) | map({category: .[0].category, count: length, entities: map(.entity)}) | sort_by(.count) | reverse | .[] | "\(.category): \(.count) entities"
complexity_analysis.architectural_complexity:
(.graph | keys | length) as $total_entities | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; {total_entities: $total_entities, total_dependencies: ($all_deps | length), max_depth: ([.graph | keys[] as $entity | max_depth($entity; [])] | max // 0), avg_dependencies: (if $total_entities > 0 then ($all_deps | length) / $total_entities else 0 end), density: (if $total_entities > 1 then ($all_deps | length) / ($total_entities * ($total_entities - 1)) else 0 end), max_fan_out: ([.graph | .[] | (.depends_on // [] | length)] | max // 0), max_fan_in: ([$total_entities as $n | range(0; $n) as $i | (.graph | keys)[$i] as $entity | ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length)] | max // 0), cyclomatic: (($all_deps | length) - $total_entities + 2), layers: ([.graph | keys[] as $entity | max_depth($entity; [])] | max // 0), leaf_nodes: ([.graph | .[] | select((.depends_on // []) | length == 0)] | length), root_nodes: ((.graph | keys) as $entities | [$entities[] as $entity | if ($all_deps | index($entity) | not) then $entity else empty end] | length)} | "Total entities: \(.total_entities)" + "
" + "Total dependencies: \(.total_dependencies)" + "
" + "Maximum dependency depth: \(.max_depth) layers" + "
" + "Average dependencies per entity: \(.avg_dependencies | . * 100 | round / 100)" + "
" + "Graph density: \(.density * 100 | . * 1000 | round / 1000)%" + "
" + "Maximum fan-out: \(.max_fan_out)" + "
" + "Maximum fan-in: \(.max_fan_in)" + "
" + "Cyclomatic complexity: \(.cyclomatic)" + "
" + "Architectural layers: \(.layers)" + "
" + "Leaf nodes (no dependencies): \(.leaf_nodes)" + "
" + "Root nodes (no dependents): \(.root_nodes)"
complexity_analysis.complexity_hotspots: def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | [.graph | keys[] as $entity | {entity: $entity, impact_score: ((.graph[$entity].depends_on // [] | length) * 2 + ($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length) * 3 + max_depth($entity; []) * 4)}] | sort_by(-.impact_score) | .[:8][] | "\(.impact_score)\t\(.entity)"
complexity_analysis.overall_assessment:
(.graph | keys | length) as $total_entities | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; {max_depth: ([.graph | keys[] as $entity | max_depth($entity; [])] | max // 0), avg_fan_out: ([.graph | .[] | (.depends_on // [] | length)] | add / length), density: (if $total_entities > 1 then ($all_deps | length) / ($total_entities * ($total_entities - 1)) else 0 end), cyclomatic: (($all_deps | length) - $total_entities + 2)} | {depth_score: (if .max_depth <= 3 then 5 elif .max_depth <= 5 then 4 elif .max_depth <= 8 then 3 elif .max_depth <= 12 then 2 else 1 end), fan_out_score: (if .avg_fan_out <= 2 then 5 elif .avg_fan_out <= 4 then 4 elif .avg_fan_out <= 6 then 3 elif .avg_fan_out <= 8 then 2 else 1 end), density_score: (if .density <= 0.1 then 5 elif .density <= 0.2 then 4 elif .density <= 0.3 then 3 elif .density <= 0.5 then 2 else 1 end), cyclomatic_score: (if .cyclomatic <= $total_entities then 5 elif .cyclomatic <= ($total_entities * 1.5) then 4 elif .cyclomatic <= ($total_entities * 2) then 3 elif .cyclomatic <= ($total_entities * 3) then 2 else 1 end)} | . + {total_score: (.depth_score + .fan_out_score + .density_score + .cyclomatic_score), grade: ((.depth_score + .fan_out_score + .density_score + .cyclomatic_score) | if . >= 18 then "A+ (Excellent)" elif . >= 16 then "A (Very Good)" elif . >= 14 then "B (Good)" elif . >= 12 then "C (Average)" elif . >= 10 then "D (Below Average)" else "F (Poor)" end)} | "Depth complexity: \(.depth_score)/5" + "
" + "Fan-out complexity: \(.fan_out_score)/5" + "
" + "Density complexity: \(.density_score)/5" + "
" + "Cyclomatic complexity: \(.cyclomatic_score)/5" + "
" + "─────────────────────────────" + "
" + "Total score: \(.total_score)/20" + "
" + "Grade: \(.grade)"
complexity_analysis.reduction_recommendations: (.graph | keys | length) as $total_entities | [.graph | .[] | .depends_on[]?] as $all_deps | def max_depth($entity; $visited): if ($visited | index($entity)) then 0 else (.graph[$entity].depends_on // []) as $deps | if ($deps | length) == 0 then 0 else [$deps[] | max_depth(.; $visited + [$entity])] | (max // 0) + 1 end end; {max_depth: ([.graph | keys[] as $entity | max_depth($entity; [])] | max // 0), avg_fan_out: ([.graph | .[] | (.depends_on // [] | length)] | add / length), high_fan_out_count: ([.graph | .[] | select((.depends_on // [] | length) > 5)] | length), high_fan_in_count: ([.graph | keys[] as $entity | select(($all_deps | map(select(. == $entity)) | length) > 3)] | length), density: (if $total_entities > 1 then ($all_deps | length) / ($total_entities * ($total_entities - 1)) else 0 end)} | [(if .max_depth > 6 then "1. 🎯 Reduce dependency chain depth (currently \(.max_depth) levels)" else empty end), (if .avg_fan_out > 4 then "2. 📦 Break down entities with high fan-out (avg \(.avg_fan_out | . * 10 | round / 10))" else empty end), (if .high_fan_out_count > 0 then "3. ✂️  Split \(.high_fan_out_count) entities with 5+ dependencies" else empty end), (if .high_fan_in_count > 0 then "4. 🔄 Reduce coupling for \(.high_fan_in_count) highly-depended entities" else empty end), (if .density > 0.3 then "5. 🏗️  Introduce architectural layers to reduce density (\(.density * 100 | round / 100)%)" else empty end), (if .max_depth > 4 and .high_fan_out_count > 2 then "6. 🎨 Consider facade pattern for complex subsystems" else empty end), (if .avg_fan_out > 3 then "7. 🧩 Use dependency injection to reduce direct coupling" else empty end)] | .[]

functions.load_jq_pattern:
# Usage: load_jq_pattern <category> <pattern_name>
# Returns the jq pattern string for use in scripts
load_jq_pattern() {
    local category="$1"
    local pattern="$2"
    jq -r ".patterns.$category.$pattern // empty" "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/jq_ref.json"
}
functions.apply_pattern:
# Usage: apply_pattern <category> <pattern> <variables...>
# Applies a jq pattern with variable substitution
apply_pattern() {
    local category="$1"
    local pattern="$2"
    shift 2
    
    local jq_pattern
    jq_pattern=$(load_jq_pattern "$category" "$pattern")
    
    if [[ -n "$jq_pattern" ]]; then
        jq -r "$jq_pattern" "$@" "$KNOWLEDGE_MAP"
    else
        echo "Pattern not found: $category.$pattern" >&2
        return 1
    fi
}
functions.list_patterns:
# Usage: list_patterns [category]
# Lists available patterns
list_patterns() {
    local category="${1:-}"
    if [[ -n "$category" ]]; then
        jq -r ".patterns.$category | keys[]" "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/jq_ref.json"
    else
        jq -r '.patterns | keys[]' "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/jq_ref.json"
    fi
}
